_comment: Manifest for scripts/validate-bbref-convention.ts. Minimum 2 non-null entries per stratum before pre-flight run. TODO entries are skipped but counted toward the gap report. bbref_url format: https://www.basketball-reference.com/boxscores/{YYYYMMDD}0{HOME_BBREF_ABBR}.html

nba_finals.note: TODO: add a second NBA Finals game (any year). Find game_id in DB: SELECT g.id, g.date, g.home_team_id, g.away_team_id FROM games g WHERE g.sport='nba' AND g.season LIKE '%-postseason' AND g.date LIKE '%-06-%' ORDER BY g.date DESC LIMIT 10

conference_finals.note: TODO: add Western Conference Finals game. Find game_id: SELECT g.id, g.date, g.home_team_id, g.away_team_id FROM games g WHERE g.sport='nba' AND g.season LIKE '%-postseason' AND g.date BETWEEN '2025-05-18' AND '2025-06-01' ORDER BY g.date LIMIT 10

play_in.note: TODO: add Play-In game. Find game_id: SELECT g.id, g.date, g.home_team_id, g.away_team_id FROM games g WHERE g.sport='nba' AND g.season LIKE '%-postseason' AND g.date BETWEEN '2025-04-13' AND '2025-04-19' ORDER BY g.date LIMIT 5
TODO: add second Play-In game (different seed bracket or different year)

cup_pool.note: TODO: add NBA Cup pool-play game. These are Nov-Dec regular schedule games with Cup branding. The game IDs are in the DB; date filter: SELECT g.id, g.date, g.home_team_id, g.away_team_id FROM games g WHERE g.sport='nba' AND g.season='2024-regular' AND g.date BETWEEN '2024-11-04' AND '2024-12-03' ORDER BY g.date LIMIT 10
TODO: add second Cup pool-play game (different group or different year)

cup_knockout.note: TODO: add NBA Cup knockout game (SF or Final, neutral site). 2024-25 Cup: QF Dec 10-11 2024 (home arenas), SF Dec 14 2024 (T-Mobile Arena Las Vegas), Final Dec 17 2024 (Las Vegas). 2023-24 Cup: QF Dec 4-5 2023 (home arenas), SF Dec 7 2023 (Las Vegas), Final Dec 9 2023 (Las Vegas). Use game IDs from data/cup-knockout-game-ids.json.
TODO: add second Cup knockout game (different year: 2023-24 Cup, Dec 2023)

marquee_broadcast.note: NBA Opening Night 2023 — defending champs DEN vs LAL, TNT marquee game

TODO: add Christmas Day, MLK Day, or other marquee ABC/TNT national-broadcast game. Find game_ids: SELECT g.id, g.date, g.home_team_id, g.away_team_id FROM games g WHERE g.sport='nba' AND (g.date LIKE '%-12-25' OR g.date LIKE '%-01-20') ORDER BY g.date DESC LIMIT 10

rescheduled_2022_23.note: TODO: add rescheduled 2022-23 game (COVID/wildfire/arena-conflict postponements re-scored from broadcast tape). These may not be in the current DB if 2022-regular is not in the eligible window — check: SELECT g.id, g.date, g.home_team_id, g.away_team_id FROM games g WHERE g.sport='nba' AND g.season='2022-regular' LIMIT 5
TODO: add second rescheduled 2022-23 game. If 2022-regular is not in the eligible window, document this stratum as N/A in the pre-flight report.

ot.note: TODO: add overtime game. Find OT games: SELECT bs.game_id, g.date, g.home_team_id, g.away_team_id FROM nba_game_box_stats bs JOIN games g ON g.id = bs.game_id WHERE bs.minutes_played > 240 GROUP BY bs.game_id LIMIT 10
TODO: add second overtime game (preferably double-OT if available)

_sentinel_note: These 4 game_ids (spanning 5 rows: nba:bdl-18447432 affects both CHI and LAC) had tov=0 due to ESPN totalTurnovers=0 sentinel pattern. The ESPN re-probe checks if ESPN now returns valid data. No bbref_url needed for sentinel probe — script looks up ESPN event ID from nba_espn_event_ids table.
